title: Dichanthelium assurgens

The genus Dichanthelium is a group of grasses that are native to North America, and Dichanthelium assurgens is a specific species within this group. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which may aid in wound healing and reduce pain.
